span.p:
채점 라우터 입력
입력: submission_id
예시: 16

span.p:
score_submission
app/router/scoring_router.py
목적: submission_id 기준 채점 트리거 진입

app/services/scoring/submissions.py

span.p:
build_scoring_context_from_submission
app/services/scoring/submissions.py
목적: submission + custom_test를 읽어 ScoringContext 조립

get_current_admin
app/services/admin/auth.py

app/repositories/custom_test_repository.py
목적: admin_custom_test_submission row 조회
출력: { id, client_id, admin_custom_test_id, answers_json }

app/repositories/custom_test_repository.py
목적: child_test row 조회
출력: { id, test_id, custom_test_name, selected_scales_json, sub_test_json }

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
answers_json 파싱
app/services/scoring/submissions.py
목적: profile / answers 추출
입력 예시: { profile, answers:[{ test_id, sub_test_json, items[] }] }

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_flatten_submission_answers
app/services/scoring/submissions.py
목적: 저장된 answers를 scorer 입력용 dict로 평탄화
출력 예시:
{
'GOLDEN::{sub_test_json}::8': '1',
'STS::{sub_test_json}::1': '3'
}

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
load_custom_test_configs
app/services/admin/common.py
목적: child_test 저장값을 test_configs 표준 구조로 복원

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
summarize_custom_test_ids
app/services/admin/common.py
목적: test_ids / test_id_text 추출
출력 예시: ['GOLDEN', 'STS'] / 'GOLDEN, STS'

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
build_custom_assessment_question_payload
app/services/admin/assessment_links.py
목적: profile에 맞는 assessment_payload 재구성
출력 예시:
{
items:[{id:'GOLDEN::{...}::8',test_id:'GOLDEN',item_id:'8'}],
selected_scales:[...],
parts:[...],
item_count:N
}

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
함수 내부 순서
app/services/scoring/submissions.py
1. assessment_payload.get('selected_scales')
2. test_id / sub_test_json / code 추출
3. selected_codes_by_test_variant 생성
4. variant마다 _build_variant_scoring_index 호출
5. scoring_index 반환

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_build_variant_scoring_index
app/services/scoring/submissions.py
목적: variant 하나에 대해 parent_scale.scale_struct를 채점용 index로 전개
입력:
- test_id
- sub_test_json
- selected_scale_codes
출력:
{ selected_scale_codes, scales }

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
fetch_parent_scale_struct
app/repositories/parent_test_repository.py
목적: parent_scale에서 scale_struct 조회
입력: test_id, sub_test_json
출력: row.scale_struct

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_build_variant_scoring_index
app/services/scoring/submissions.py
scale_struct JSON 파싱 성공 + dict 인가?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
빈 scales 반환
{ selected_scale_codes:[...], scales:{} }

display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_normalize_choice_score_map
app/services/scoring/submissions.py
목적: choice_score 문자열 맵을 숫자 점수표 index로 정규화
입력 예시:
{'22': {'1':'5','2':'4','3':'3','4':'2','5':'1'}}
출력 예시:
{'22': {'1':5,'2':4,'3':3,'4':2,'5':1}}

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ScoringContext 생성
app/services/scoring/base.py
입력:
- custom_test_id
- custom_test_name
- profile
- answers
- answers_by_test_variant
- scoring_index_by_test_variant
- assessment_payload
출력 예시:
ScoringContext(
custom_test_id=3,
custom_test_name='봄학기용 검사',
answers={...},
answers_by_test_variant={...},
scoring_index_by_test_variant={...}
)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
trigger_submission_scoring 응답 조립
app/services/scoring/submissions.py
출력:
{ submission_id, client_id, admin_custom_test_id, test_ids, flattened_answer_count, assessment_item_count, engine_statuses, results, status }

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ScoringEngine.score_tests
app/services/scoring/engine.py
입력:
- test_ids=['GOLDEN','STS']
- context=ScoringContext(...)
